reason: Global TianChen-RV architecture and RVV stage-order invariants for this refactor.
RVV Stage2 route-family owner, typed body/config authority, provider-plan verifier, mirror metadata, and common EmitC neutrality contracts.
TCRVEmitCLowerableRoute and common EmitC neutrality boundary.
tcrv.exec ABI/runtime envelope boundary and prohibition on core compute/dtype authority.
Added the dedicated elementwise route-family plan owner API surface for predicates, derive/apply/validate, operand bindings, provider-plan verification, and route-description mirror checks.

Moved plain/masked/strided and scalar-broadcast elementwise arithmetic plan authority, ABI order, dtype/config validation, target/profile, C type/header mapping, intrinsic mirrors, and fail-closed diagnostics into the owner.
Reduced central planning to shared analysis, neutral dispatch, closure checks, and provider handoff for elementwise arithmetic route families.
Extended focused provider-plan and mirror mismatch coverage to the owner-derived plain and scalar-broadcast elementwise plans.
